keys.description: Active payment provider config list for a tenant. Read on every PaymentIntent create to determine which provider to route the invoice to.
Tenant's default provider slug. Read on every PaymentIntent create when the caller doesn't specify a provider explicitly.
Circuit-breaker state per (tenant, provider). Read by the pre-dispatch gate on every intent create. Short TTL because state changes frequently.
invalidatedBy: PaymentProviderCircuitBreakerClosed (in reference from operations feedback loop)

keys.description: Customer's active payment methods. Read on every 'select payment method' UI render. Hot path — every payment intent create hits this cache.
Customer's default payment method. Read on every PaymentIntent create when the caller doesn't specify a method_id.
Fully-hydrated payment intent snapshot. Read by the customer's SDK during confirmation. Short TTL because intent state changes frequently.
Tenant's 3DS2 threshold configuration (from settings.three_ds.required_over_amount_cents + tenant overrides + high_risk_regions). Read by ThreeDsGate on every intent create.
Unresolved dispute count per tenant. Feeds the SDUI dispute-count badge.
Disputes with evidence_due_by within the next 7 days. Read by the SDUI evidence-due-soon widget + the ops daily digest.
Provider capability matrix — read once at boot into an in-memory registry. This cache is a warm-boot accelerator.
Parsed data/providers/<provider>-config.schema.json JSON Schema object. Read by PaymentProviderConfigObserver on every config create/update.
Decrypted webhook signing secret for a provider config. Read on every inbound webhook signature verification. Short TTL because credentials are rotation-sensitive.
Timestamp of the last successful ReconcilePaymentIntentsJob run per (tenant, provider). Read by the health probe + read by the next reconcile run for lookback windowing.
